notes.title: Ace Your Classes - Welcome to Helium!

ops.insert: Ace Your Classes - Welcome to Helium!
Helium is your personal student planner—schedules, assignments, grades, and notes all in one place, so you can focus on
Stay on Top of Your Work
Track grades with weighted categories, trend indicators, and a calculator to see what you need on upcoming assignments
Sync external calendars (Google, Apple, etc.) into one view
Set reminders so you never miss a deadline again
Know when a class's grade is at-risk and might need attention
Keep attachments with their assignments—no more digging through folders
Organize resources (textbooks, links, supplies) by class so you know what to bring to your next study session
Every assignment and event has a built-in note for lecture highlights, study guides, or quick thoughts.
"The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
Use checklists to track your progress:
Feel free to edit or delete this note. Happy studying!
Login with school email for Drive access
Review loops, conditionals, and basic data structures.
Compare to theories of critical periods
Watch 5-min video on prefrontal cortex injury
Need parts from group partners to compile before turning in:
